'''farozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roachification|roachification]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-r-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roachification|roachification]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| farozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:færezheth|færezheth]] || [[word:færezhej|færezhej]] || [[word:færezhesh|færezhesh]] || [[word:færezhe|færezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:farorozhoth|farorozhoth]] || [[word:farorozhoj|farorozhoj]] || [[word:farorozhosh|farorozhosh]] || [[word:farorozho|farorozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:farozhoth|farozhoth]] || [[word:farozhoj|farozhoj]] || [[word:farozhosh|farozhosh]] || [[word:farozho|farozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:farofzhoth|farofzhoth]] || [[word:farofzhoj|farofzhoj]] || [[word:farofzhosh|farofzhosh]] || [[word:farofzhof|farofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:farozhotho|farozhotho]] || [[word:farozhojo|farozhojo]] || [[word:farozhosho|farozhosho]] || [[word:farozhoko|farozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:farozhoth|farozhoth]] || [[word:farozhoj|farozhoj]] || [[word:farozhosh|farozhosh]] || [[word:farozho|farozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:farozhothol|farozhothol]] || [[word:farozhojol|farozhojol]] || [[word:farozhoshol|farozhoshol]] || [[word:farozhokol|farozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:farozhothotho|farozhothotho]] || [[word:farozhojojo|farozhojojo]] || [[word:farozhoshosho|farozhoshosho]] || [[word:farozhoko|farozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:farozhothon|farozhothon]] || [[word:farozhojon|farozhojon]] || [[word:farozhoshon|farozhoshon]] || [[word:farozhokon|farozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:farozhothoro|farozhothoro]] || [[word:farozhojoro|farozhojoro]] || [[word:farozhoshoro|farozhoshoro]] || [[word:farozhokoro|farozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
